name: canshare-who-testicular-adnexa-site-histology
title: NZ WHO testicular adnexa site histology
description: Histologies used for testicular adnexa sites, from WHO Classification of Tumours, Urinary & Male Genital Tumours (latest edition) - Sections 7. Tumours of the testicular adnexa, 9. Neuroendocrine neoplasms, 11. Haematolymphoid tumours, 12. Melanocytic lesions or an 'Other' value.
